name: 86 Chaos 15.0.79 Safe Component Split + Inventory Load Control
label: 86 Chaos 15.0.79
notes: Splits heavy authenticated feature areas behind a safe login shell, isolates Inventory into its own feature chunk, removes duplicate shell inventory listeners, and loads Inventory invoices, burn logs, AI order data, menu graph, events, and prep-order data only when their sub-tabs need them.
